title: Code with Claude 2026 | Tokyo
summary: Anthropic held Code with Claude 2026 in Tokyo, a conference featuring announcements about Claude models, the Claude Platform, and Claude Code, with demonstrations from partner organizations Canva, Mizuho, and NRI.
writeup: This video documents Anthropic's Code with Claude 2026 conference in Tokyo, which gathered announcements across three areas: the Claude models, the Claude Platform, and Claude Code. Partner organizations Canva, Mizuho, and NRI presented demonstrations of their use of these tools. The event signals Anthropic's developer and enterprise push in the Japanese market, and the takeaways center on the latest updates to the model lineup, the platform, and the coding tooling.
